The '''Sran Outpost''' was an installation of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]<ref name="AIR" /> located in<ref name="Planetnamia" /> the [[Sran system/Legends|Sran system]], a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Ash Worlds/Legends|Ash Worlds]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> At some point prior to the evacuation of the [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] [[Dantooine base/Legends|base]] on<ref name="AIR" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]<ref name="AIR" /> during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]],<ref name="TEA" /> the outpost came under attack. The Rebel [[Officer/Legends|officer]] [[Risiev Credal]] exhibited tactical brilliance during the defense and was subsequently transferred to the Dantooine base to further his tactical education under high-ranking Alliance officers.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Sran Outpost was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" />
